scenario: CRITICAL issue: null pointer dereference in production code

input.critical_issue: Null pointer dereference at src/api/handlers.ts:45 when user.profile is undefined

expected_behavior: Skill must (1) Load PR review report, (2) Apply minimal fix: add null check before accessing user.profile, (3) Run full test suite: 'npm test' (or pytest), (4) Confirm all tests GREEN. Commit fix with message: 'fix: add null check for user.profile (+ regression test)'. Report: 'CRITICAL issue resolved. Test suite GREEN. Proceeding to Stage 6.'
notes: CRITICAL issues block handoff. Must verify all tests GREEN before declaring DONE.

scenario: WARNING issue: performance optimization approved by reviewer

input.warning_issue: WARNING: O(n²) loop at src/utils/search.ts:28 — optimize to O(n log n)

expected_behavior: Skill must (1) Check reviewer approval (YES), (2) Apply optimization: replace nested loops with sorted binary search, (3) Run full test suite including performance tests, (4) Confirm all tests still PASS and performance improves. Commit: 'refactor: optimize search algorithm O(n²) → O(n log n)'. Report optimization metrics.
notes: Optimization only if reviewer approved AND safe without changing test behavior.

scenario: SUGGESTION issue: refactoring request NOT approved by user

input.suggestion_issue: SUGGESTION: extract long function (120 lines) into smaller helpers

expected_behavior: Skill must check user approval. If not approved, SKIP this suggestion. Report: 'SUGGESTION: extract function — NOT approved by user. Skipping.' Do NOT refactor without explicit user approval. Proceed to next issue.
notes: SUGGESTION items require explicit user approval. Do not auto-implement.

expected_behavior: Skill must detect test regression: 'Optimization introduced regression — testCalculateTotalWithNegativeValues now fails. Reverting optimization and confirming original tests GREEN.' Report: 'Original test suite GREEN restored. This optimization cannot be safely applied — requires design change (out of scope). Reporting to user for decision.'
notes: Red flag: never hide test failures. Regression = optimization must be reverted or escalated.

expected_behavior: Skill must prioritize: (1) Fix CRITICAL memory leak first, run tests, confirm passing. (2) Then apply WARNING (code deduplication), run tests again, confirm still passing. Report each fix with test output. Final status: 'All CRITICAL and WARNING issues resolved. Test suite GREEN (16/16). Ready for Stage 6.'
notes: CRITICAL issues first, then WARNING. Each must pass full test suite before proceeding.

scenario: Full test suite GREEN requirement before handoff

input.test_results: 14/15 tests PASSED, 1 test SKIPPED due to flaky timing

expected_behavior: Skill must enforce: 'BLOCKED: 1 test result is not GREEN. Test results must show ALL tests PASSED (or properly documented as infrastructure-level skip, not code-level skip). Investigate flaky test timing and fix root cause OR confirm timing skip is documented in test.' Run test suite again until fully GREEN.
notes: HARD GATE: no handoff if any test is not GREEN. Every test must be either PASSED or have documented valid skip reason.

scenario: Fix requires design change (out of scope)

input.critical_issue: API response schema cannot be fixed without breaking backward compatibility
input.reviewer_feedback: must remove 'userId' to comply with new API contract
input.scope_limitation: s5-fix-optimize is fix layer, not design layer

expected_behavior: Skill must detect design conflict: 'BLOCKED: fixing this CRITICAL issue requires API contract redesign (out of Stage 5 scope). Design change must be approved by PM in Stage 1. Report conflict: backcompat breaking change vs. new contract. Decision needed: deprecate field or rollback new contract requirement.'
notes: Design changes are out of scope for fix-optimize stage. Escalate to user for decision.
